title: woodsia oregana var. lyallii
intro: Woodsia oregana var. lyallii, also known as Lyall's Woodsia or the Fern-like Woodsia, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and is often found in shaded, rocky areas. The medicinal properties of Woodsia oregana var. lyallii include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which may offer health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved lung function, and relief from respiratory discomfort.
